text:
is a Japanese voice actor, actor, tarento, narrator, master of ceremonies and impressionist from Shiogama, Miyagi Prefecture. He graduated from Tohoku Gakuin University's economics school, and is currently affiliated with Across Entertainment. Before that, he was affiliated with the Tokyo Actor's Consumer's Cooperative Society. He voices Ryoji Kaji.

His nickname is Yama-chan (山ちゃん Yama-chan). As a radio personality, he is known as Bazooka Yamadera (バズーカ山寺 Bazūka Yamadera) among other things. 

A selection of other characters voiced by Koichi Yamadera

Bubblegum Crisis (OVA) as Fargo

Cowboy Bebop as Spike Spiegel

Donkey Kong Country as Donkey Kong (only on the Japanese Dub)
Danganronpa V3: Killing Harmony - Monotaro, Monophanie, Monodam, Monosuke, Monokid.

Ghost in the Shell (movie & TV series) as Togusa

Guy, Double Target as Guy

Lupin III: Crisis in Tokyo as Michael Suzuki
Mario Kart Arcade GP 2 - Color Commentator

Mermaid Forest and Mermaid's Scar as Yuta

Mickey Mouse franchise as Donald Duck (only on the Japanese Dub)

Milennium Actress as Key Man

Ninja Scroll (movie) as Jubei Kibagami

Paprika (movie) as Doctor Morio Osanai

Pokémon as Mew

Ranma 1/2 as Ryouga Hibiki/P-chan and Jusenkyo Guide

Stitch! (Japanese/Madhouse Version) as Stitch

Yakuza (video game series) as Shun Akiyama

and many more...

Notes

In addition to anime work, Yamadera's output included dubbing numerous Western films and TV shows, as well as Disney features, in his long career.
Is a host of an early-morning television show.
Yamadera is extremely versatile, be it heroes or villains, and even going as far as voicing as a woman .
